case_title: SCOTT STEVENSON BAIL BONDS VS. DANIEL BASSI

docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO JAN-14-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF DEC-07-2018 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY SCOTT STEVENSON BAIL BONDS AS TO DEFENDANT BASSI, DANIEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-07-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $40.00) SERVED FEB-11-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BASSI, DANIEL
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF SCOTT STEVENSON BAIL BONDS
DECLARATION RE: RESET OF TRIAL DATE FOR NON-SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF SCOTT STEVENSON BAIL BONDS
(SC-105) REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER AND ANSWER (SMALL CLAIMS) - FILED PURSUANT TO LITIGANTS REQUEST - FILED BY DEFENDANT BASSI, DANIEL
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) MICHAEL B. BASSI - WITNESS FILED BY DEFENDANT BASSI, DANIEL

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-14-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO FEB-28-2019 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF SCOTT STEVENSON BAIL BONDS APPEARED, REPRESENTED BY SCOTT STEVENSON, BAIL AGENT. DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM MAXWELL PRITT, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER CONTINUED TO FEB-28-2019 AT 1:30PM FOR PROGRESS REPORT (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT BASSI, DANIEL
ORDER GRANTING REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-28-2019 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO AUG-28-2019 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SCOTT STEVENSON BAIL BONDS

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF SCOTT STEVENSON BAIL BONDS IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT DANIEL BASSI, REPRESENTED BY MICHAEL B. BASSI, WITNESS IS PRESENT. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
